ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the institution or organization that issued the financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., Price_TY_0_IOB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument (e.g., T-Note (10 Year)) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., Bond, Stock) */,
  "maturity" TEXT /* Maturity period of the instrument */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Interest rate paid periodically to the holder of the instrument */,
  "face_value" REAL /* Face value or principal amount of the instrument */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was issued */,
  "market_sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry to which the instrument belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for dividends, splits, etc. */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume */,
  "trading_volume_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the trading volume is denominated */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded */,
  "price_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which the price data was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for each role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES price_data ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for programmatically accessing data from the source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is updated or provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data source for the instrument */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data source for the instrument */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Description or percentage of the data coverage for the instrument from the source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* How often the data for the instrument is updated by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the data quality */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used to validate the data quality */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data quality was last validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES price_data ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_categories" (
  "instrument_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)
